title: rubus × aspetensis
intro: Rubus × aspetensis, also known as the Aspet raspberry or hybrid raspberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × aspetensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × aspetensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
